VJs TV is the global broadcast network for VJ culture, audiovisual performances, and digital visual art. Watch live performances, discover artists, and explore the world of visual performance.

Immersive Visual Entertainment Platform

Explore Technology Become a Sponsor

Technology

This is attractive for sponsors.

🎬

Visual Software

Real-time video mixing, compositing, and generative visual creation tools powering live performances worldwide.

📽

Projection Systems

High-lumen projection arrays and architectural mapping systems transforming spaces into immersive canvases.

🖥

Media Servers

Enterprise-grade media servers delivering synchronized multi-screen content for concerts, festivals, and installations.

💡

LED Technologies

Next-generation LED walls, panels, and pixel-mapped surfaces enabling massive visual displays.

🤖

AI Visual Tools

Machine learning and generative AI systems creating never-before-seen visual experiences in real-time.

Industry-Leading Tools

The software powering global visual performance culture

R

Resolume

The industry standard for live VJ performance. Real-time video mixing with powerful effects and output mapping.

TD

TouchDesigner

Node-based visual programming for generative art, interactive installations, and immersive experiences.

MM

MadMapper

Advanced projection mapping and LED mapping software for spatial augmented reality and architectural projections.

Partner With Us

VJs TV connects brands with the global visual performance community. Whether you're a software company, hardware manufacturer, or creative agency, there's a partnership tier designed for you.
